{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016353125F960C8551BF84D3206"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599647922346722072","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，麦田写的尤为突出，就是内容太少了，不过瘾"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769474314,"group_id":"7594339554933345304","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只是一个无名的陌路人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NylfLy5LCGK6FRYpozR01X5r+iXAseRH4+FeHmqdX+Bk","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6c99dbd81792445f8a7b0ead0a0e7ed0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533221&x-signature=Mhvsa06N0q1wbxI2RbaR2C1id0w%3D","user_id":"1917192937678142","user_name":"你的鱼梓呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1917192937678142","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594339554933345304","book_info":{"abstract":"单元剧提醒
这里不是你的家。
这里是由无尽的陌生空间，非欧几里得几何的走廊，以及潜伏在视线边缘之物的集合体。他们称之为“后室”。没有人自愿前来，但总有人不幸………坠入。
本书并非攻略，也不是英雄的史诗。它是一摞遗落的日记，破碎的录音稿，以及最后一条未能发出的手机备忘录。这些文字的主人，有学生，护士，司机，程序员……你将读到：一位建筑师在无限复制的办公楼里，绘制着不可能存在的平面图，直到他的草图开始自行延伸……一位母亲在充满婴儿啼哭的密室中，疯狂地列表比对，寻找她那可能从未存在的孩子………
一个网红至死都在对着黑屏的手机镜头，强颜欢笑：“家人们，这期挑战太刺激了…”
（注：本书内容参考自后室中文维基百科 纯属个人喜好后室设定而二创
